prose: **Formaldehyde frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted RI), PySCF (no solvent, gas phase), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: taken from user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` (no DFT re-optimization; single-point frontier orbitals). SCF converged in 8 cycles. HOMO = −7.6523067 eV (orbital index 7), LUMO = −1.7826355 eV (index 8) → HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.8696712 eV. Command: `cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --out live.json`.
